criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The level of user interaction and activity within the app, measured by metrics such as daily active users, session length, and retention rates.
criteria.sources: App analytics platforms, user reviews, and app store metrics.

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent and effectiveness of AI features integrated into the app, such as chatbots, recommendation systems, and content moderation tools.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, and tech blogs.

criteria.name: User Reviews and Ratings
criteria.description: The average rating and sentiment of user reviews on app stores, indicating user satisfaction and feedback.
criteria.sources: App store listings and review analysis tools.

criteria.name: Innovation and Uniqueness
criteria.description: The originality and creativity of the app's features and user experience, setting it apart from competitors.
criteria.sources: Tech blogs, app descriptions, and expert reviews.

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: The robustness of the app's privacy policies and security measures to protect user data and ensure safe interactions.
criteria.sources: App permissions, privacy policies, and security audit reports.
